title: The History of Don Quixote, Volume 2, Part 22
summaries: "The History of Don Quixote, Volume 2, Part 22" by Miguel de Cervantes Saavedra is part of a novel originally published in two parts in 1605 and 1615. The story follows Alonso Quijano, a Spanish nobleman who loses himself in chivalric romances and reinvents himself as the knight-errant Don Quixote. Accompanied by his practical squire Sancho Panza, he embarks on delusional adventures, mistaking windmills for giants and inns for castles. Their journey explores the blurred line between fantasy and reality in this founding work of Western literature. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
subjects: Spain -- Social life and customs -- 16th century -- Fiction
